profile.tagline: UX-Engineer & Software-Entwickler — Konzeption, Code und Video aus einer Hand.
profile.bio: Ich gestalte und entwickle digitale Produkte — von der ersten Skizze bis zum barrierefreien Produktivsystem.

about.title: Über mich
about.intro: Ich lebe in Frankfurt am Main — nach vier Jahren als digitaler Nomade durch Asien, Süd- und Zentralamerika, in denen ich remote für meine Kunden gearbeitet habe. Diese Zeit hat meinen Blick dafür geschärft, wie unterschiedlich Menschen Technik nutzen — und warum zugängliche Gestaltung kein Nice-to-have ist, sondern die Grundlage guter Produkte.

profile.tagline: UX engineer & software developer — concept, code, and video from one source.
profile.bio: I design and build digital products — from the first sketch to an accessible production system.

about.title: About me
about.intro: I live in Frankfurt, Germany — after four years as a digital nomad across Asia, South and Central America, working remotely for my clients. That time sharpened my sense of how differently people use technology — and why accessible design is not a nice-to-have, but the foundation of good products.

en.patina: Checks historical novels for anachronisms — with DWDS evidence and your final call.

en.hugur: Notes, links, and ideas in one searchable stream — browser, extension, and Android.
en.tile-weave: Generate fabric patterns with AI, check tile seams, preview them on 3D garments.
en.suntino: Chrome extension: summarize pages, YouTube, and PDFs in the side panel.
en.luhambo: GPS routes as 3D flythroughs with photo stops — open map data.
en.cimdata-kurse: Filter CIMDATA courses by start date, build a study plan, share via link.
en.echt-oder-ki: Daily duel: spot AI fakes in text and images — three levels, leaderboards.
